Summaryinfo.ReportTitle: Most Recent Structuring of Canadian Cities

TextObject.Name: Text2
TextObject.Text: Most Recent Structuring of Canadian Cities

TextObject.Name: Text7
TextObject.Text:
* Most recent structuring date is a general figure that implies when a place was last structured, for example:
- Established - Incorporated - Restructured - Promoted to City - Demoted to Town - Other
